title: Broaden what "rmi" can accept, and add tests
body: Teach "rmi" to handle arbitrary image references and image references that implicitly refer to the local store, and add tests for both, falling back to remove-by-ID for anything left after we finish the basic tests.  This _should_ fix the errors in the self-test which currently cause CI to fail for #59.

comments.body: :scream_cat: `fc27a56` is not a valid commit SHA. Please try again with `e583b9c`.
Truncated IDs should work as soon as we get https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/6, or something like it in.
